mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, week_start AS weekStart, slot, mission_code AS missionCode, title, target_count AS targetCount, progress, reward_granted AS rewardGranted FROM user_weekly_mission WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND week_start = #{weekStart} ORDER BY slot
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_weekly_mission (user_id, week_start, slot, mission_code, title, target_count, progress, reward_granted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{weekStart}, #{slot}, #{missionCode}, #{title}, #{targetCount}, #{progress}, #{rewardGranted})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_weekly_mission SET progress = #{progress} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND week_start = #{weekStart} AND slot = #{slot}
UPDATE user_weekly_mission SET reward_granted = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND week_start = #{weekStart} AND slot = #{slot}
